welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Yoruba Action Council
welcome.description: Advancing the progress of the Yoruba nation, preserving cultural traditions, and deploying the professionalism of our members for global Yoruba development.

heritage.title: Preserving
heritage.subtitle: Our Rich Heritage
heritage.description: Celebrating and protecting Yoruba cultural traditions, language, arts, and ancestral wisdom for future generations.

tourism.subtitle: Yorubaland Tourism
tourism.description: Showcasing the beauty, history, and vibrant culture of Yorubaland to the world through sustainable tourism initiatives.

education.subtitle: Through Education

about.heading: Advancing the Yoruba Nation
about.description: Yoruba Action Council (YAC) was incorporated in New Jersey, USA on May 29th, 2018 by like-minded Yoruba professionals to promote Yoruba interest, uphold and enhance our heritage through political and socio-economic rebranding.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To assist in the progress of Yoruba's world and to use our intellects to support the global empowerment of the Yoruba.

unity.title: Unity & Community
unity.description: Working in one accord to empower our people at all levels of society, promoting peace, unity, love, and prosperity.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Operating as a link between the Yoruba Nation, the diaspora, and global interaction for worldwide development.

cultural.title: Cultural Preservation
cultural.description: Promoting and supporting Yoruba cultural traditions, preventing our rich heritage from extinction through research.

pledge.title: Our Solemn Pledge
pledge.intro: We, the descendants of the Yoruba, desiring to promote the interests and welfare of the Yoruba globally...
items: Committed to transparency with a great sense of justice and honesty
Exceptionally committed to excellence in upholding our heritage
The youth shall occupy a prime position in all our efforts

events.label: Events
events.title: Get Involved in Events
events.description: Come and take part in our events for the Yoruba's growth and the advancement of its institutions. Together, we can make a lasting impact.

donate.label: Support Us
donate.title: Together, Let's Make Change Happen
donate.description: Your generous contribution helps us continue our mission of advancing the Yoruba nation, supporting education, and preserving our cultural heritage.

footer.description: A 501(c)(3) non-profit organization promoting the heritage, welfare, and progress of the Yoruba people globally since 2018.

membership.title: YAC Membership
membership.subtitle: Join the Yoruba Advocacy Council and become part of a global movement dedicated to advancing the progress of Yoruba descendants worldwide.
membership.introLabel: Membership of the Yoruba Action Council
membership.introText1: The Yoruba Action Council is a 501(c)3 organization set up and registered in New Jersey, United States of America, dedicated to advancing the progress of Yoruba descendants globally.
membership.introText2: As a member, you become part of a vibrant community committed to cultural preservation, economic empowerment, and the advancement of Yoruba interests worldwide.
membership.objectivesSubtitle: As a YAC member, you commit to supporting these 15 core objectives
membership.categoriesSubtitle: YAC offers various membership categories to welcome all Yoruba descendants
infoItems: Membership for ANYAM and AYM categories may be obtained only through referral by a minimum of two foundation members affirming the individual as an honorable Yoruba descendant by birth or marriage.
The YAC registration fee is a one-time payment required of all members except the honorary members.
Annual fees and other financial obligations may be levied to all categories of the YAC membership as may be determined from time to time by the YAC executive and ratified by the YAC membership.
membership.registerSubtitle: Fill out the form below and our membership team will contact you

form.messagePlaceholder: Share why you're interested in joining YAC and any relevant background...

membership.ctaText: For membership inquiries or questions, please contact our membership team directly.

leadership.title: Leadership & Board
leadership.subtitle: Meet the dedicated individuals who guide YAC's mission to advance the progress of the Yoruba nation and preserve our rich cultural heritage.
leadership.ctaText: We're always looking for dedicated individuals to join our cause. Together, we can make a lasting impact on the Yoruba community worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Empowering the Yoruba community worldwide through unity, progress, and cultural preservation
mission.statementText: The Yoruba Advocacy Congress is committed to advancing the interests of Yoruba people worldwide through intellectual engagement, cultural promotion, and collaborative partnerships. Our 13-point mission outlines our dedication to progress, unity, and global empowerment.
points: To provide assistance in the progress of the Yoruba world
To use our intellects to support the empowerment of Yorubas globally
To serve as an advisory organization to other Pan-Yoruba organizations
To promote and support democracy at all levels and foster Yoruba growth in the political arena
To encourage and deliberate on issues paramount to the Yoruba people
To foster the economic empowerment of Yorubas globally
To work with other organizations across the globe and Nigeria to promote peace, stability, justice, and unity while working fervently for the promotion of Yoruba's interest
To engage in activities worldwide that promote and ensure social justice, equity, business opportunities, and interests of Yoruba
To work diligently to bridge the information gap between the Yoruba and the world
To ensure the advancement of Yoruba traditional institutions
Promoting the advancement of Yoruba as a giant in politics, economics, and social initiatives
Providing awareness about our civic rights as Yoruba indigenes
To honor and respect other peoples and cultures around the world as God's creation
mission.ctaText: Be part of a global movement dedicated to the advancement and empowerment of Yoruba people everywhere.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Elevating the Yoruba race among the Committee of Nations
vision.statementText1: A clear-cut vision of YAC envisaged an enhanced and aloft placement of the Yoruba race among the Committee of Nations within the existing provision of human and natural resources in the cliché of Nigeria contraption.
vision.statementText2: This includes brainstorming of like-minded Yoruba professionals in various fields of human development, and in creating a purposive environment that will lead to the growth and development of human capital within Nigeria and the diaspora through micro and macroeconomic indices.
vision.purposeText: To make YAC the epitome of services for the advancement of the Yoruba Race globally
vision.objectivesSubtitle: The foundational pillars that guide our vision toward achieving global Yoruba advancement
objectives: To advance and enhance the progress of the Yoruba nation
Employ and deploy the professionalism of members for the Yoruba global development
Cooperation with the other Pan Yoruba groups in coordinating pro Yoruba events
Operate as a link between the Yoruba Nation, the diaspora, and global interaction
Promote and support Yoruba cultural tradition, and thus, preventing the culture from extinction through research and development
vision.pledgeText: We commit to the promotion of peace, unity, love, and prosperity for all Yoruba, empowering people at all levels of society.
vision.ctaText: Join us in building a future where Yoruba excellence is recognized and celebrated worldwide.

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: Paving the path towards change since 2018
history.foundingText1: Yoruba Action Council was officially incorporated in New Jersey, USA on the 29th of May 2018. This historic date marked the formal establishment of an organization dedicated to the welfare and affairs of the Yoruba people worldwide.
history.foundingText2: This enormous task was put together by like-minded Yoruba professionals living in New Jersey, United States of America, united by a common goal: to promote Yoruba interest, uphold and enhance her heritage.
history.foundingText3: YAC is a Non-Governmental Organization with a 501(c)(3) Certificate for the projection of human and community development centered among the Yoruba people in the diaspora and at home in Nigeria.
history.timelineSubtitle: Key moments in our journey of advancing Yoruba interests globally

timeline.title: Official Incorporation
timeline.description: Yoruba Action Council was officially incorporated in New Jersey, USA, marking the beginning of a new chapter for Yoruba advocacy in the diaspora.

timeline.title: Founding Vision
timeline.description: Like-minded Yoruba professionals living in New Jersey came together to establish YAC with the mission to promote Yoruba interest, uphold and enhance her heritage.

timeline.title: 501(c)(3) Status
timeline.description: YAC obtained its 501(c)(3) certificate, establishing it as a recognized Non-Governmental Organization for human and community development.

timeline.title: Community Outreach Begins
timeline.description: YAC launched its first community outreach programs, connecting Yoruba people across the diaspora and strengthening ties with Nigeria.

timeline.title: Global Expansion
timeline.description: Despite global challenges, YAC expanded its reach, establishing connections with Yoruba communities worldwide and launching digital initiatives.

timeline.title: Project Initiatives
timeline.description: YAC launched major project initiatives including Tourism Promotion, Educational Sponsorship, Cultural Promotion, and Water Borehole projects.

timeline.title: Continued Growth
timeline.description: YAC continues to grow as the epitome of services for the advancement of the Yoruba Race globally, with active programs and an expanding membership.

history.legacyText: From our humble beginnings in New Jersey to our current global presence, YAC continues to grow and evolve. Our commitment to the advancement of Yoruba people remains unwavering as we work towards a future where our culture, traditions, and values thrive across generations.
